inbox.subject: TradieMate CI run failed / PAT expiry

briefing.focus: Push the Nomad hostel proposal forward — the single item that genuinely moves the business.
briefing.text: Morning, Zac. Calendar's clear today, so it's yours to shape. Nothing urgent in the inbox — mostly noise, though Supabase has flagged that idle day-sheets project for pausing, so take a quick look if you still want it. On Nest, there's just the one open job: the Nomad hostel proposal, still sitting in to-do with no date on it — that's the one to move. Your portfolio's around thirty-six and a half thousand, down about three thousand two hundred overall. WiseTech's the drag, off roughly fifteen percent against your cost, but ServiceNow's up near six, and your Vanguard five hundred is nicely in the green. On the watchlist, Bapcor's the mover, down sharply, while CSL and Telix each slipped a couple of percent and Woodside ticked up. Across Wall Street it was a mixed close — consumer cyclicals and healthcare led, energy lagged, and Microsoft was the standout. If you do one thing today, push the Nomad proposal forward. It's the single thing that actually moves the business.
